steps.title: Identify the opposition
steps.content: Topographic maps show elevations above sea level, while bathymetric maps show elevations below the sea. The transition must mark the contrast between those two domains.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast signals
steps.content: Choice A signals a conclusion, but the sentence introduces a new contrast. Choice B signals an example, though bathymetric maps are not an example of topographic maps. Choice D signals time order, which is irrelevant here. The answer is C.
